# Instructions

- Following Playwright test failed.
- Explain why, be concise, respect Playwright best practices.
- Provide a snippet of code with the fix, if possible.

# Test info

- Name: ds3-validation.spec.ts >> DS-3 Program Name Validation & Duplicate Prevention (Didaxis Studio) >> TC-013 - After a duplicate error, fixing the name and re-clicking Create succeeds
- Location: tests/ds3-validation.spec.ts:245:7

# Error details

```
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
```

```
Error: locator.click: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Call log:
  - waiting for getByRole('dialog', { name: 'New Program' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Create' })
    - locator resolved to <button type="button" class="mantine-focus-auto mantine-active m_77c9d27d mantine-Button-root m_87cf2631 mantine-UnstyledButton-root">…</button>
  - attempting click action
    2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable
      - element is not stable
    - retrying click action
    - waiting 20ms
    - waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable
    - element is not stable
  - retrying click action
    - waiting 100ms
    - waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable
  - element was detached from the DOM, retrying

```


# Test source

```ts
  1  | import type { Locator, Page } from '@playwright/test';
  2  | 
  3  | export class NewProgramModal {
  4  |   readonly dialog: Locator;
  5  |   readonly heading: Locator;
  6  |   readonly programNameInput: Locator;
  7  |   readonly descriptionInput: Locator;
  8  |   readonly createButton: Locator;
  9  |   readonly cancelButton: Locator;
  10 |   readonly fieldAlert: Locator;
  11 |   readonly duplicateError: Locator;
  12 | 
  13 |   constructor(readonly page: Page) {
  14 |     this.dialog = page.getByRole('dialog', { name: 'New Program' });
  15 |     this.heading = this.dialog.getByRole('heading', { name: 'New Program' });
  16 |     this.programNameInput = this.dialog.getByLabel('Program Name');
  17 |     this.descriptionInput = this.dialog.getByLabel('Description');
  18 |     this.createButton = this.dialog.getByRole('button', { name: 'Create' });
  19 |     this.cancelButton = this.dialog.getByRole('button', { name: 'Cancel' });
  20 |     this.fieldAlert = this.dialog.getByRole('alert');
  21 |     this.duplicateError = this.dialog.getByText(
  22 |       /already exists|duplicate|taken|in use/i
  23 |     );
  24 |   }
  25 | 
  26 |   async fillProgramName(name: string): Promise<void> {
  27 |     await this.programNameInput.fill(name);
  28 |   }
  29 | 
  30 |   async fillDescription(description: string): Promise<void> {
  31 |     await this.descriptionInput.fill(description);
  32 |   }
  33 | 
  34 |   async clickCreate(): Promise<void> {
> 35 |     await this.createButton.click();
     |                             ^ Error: locator.click: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
  36 |   }
  37 | 
  38 |   async clickCancel(): Promise<void> {
  39 |     await this.cancelButton.click();
  40 |   }
  41 | 
  42 |   async focusProgramName(): Promise<void> {
  43 |     await this.programNameInput.focus();
  44 |   }
  45 | }
  46 | 
```
